subject: Help us through the finish line!
body: I just got out of a meeting with Senator Scott, and we have to raise $50,000within the day to keep our campaign fueled through Election Day. Democrats hada MASSIVE last-minute spend in Florida, and if we’re going to keep fightingback, we need to match their energy. Can you make an urgent contribution todayto help us meet our last-minute GOTV goal? RUSH A DONATION Thank you, JackieCampaign Manager Rick Scott for Florida Team Rick Scott Featured Merchandise*Made in the USA* "Help, I'm Lost" Golf Balls! Golf Balls and Joe Biden, thetwo things that seem to get themselves lost the most! Claim your set of"Help,I'm Lost" Golf Balls today! 2024 Official Membership Card Become an OfficialMember of Team Rick Scott by claiming your 2024 Membership Card! "SocialismSucks" White Cotton T-Shirt Socialism sucks, simple as that. Claim your"Socialism Sucks" T-Shirt today and let socialists know that they are notwelcome in Florida! A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’sAmerica includes record-high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, andincreasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important andit will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protectour Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, soplease,click here to support my efforts to keep freedom alive in America. Thank youfor your support, Senator Rick Scott SUPPORT MY FIGHT HERE Paid for by RickScott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible ascharitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. This email was sentto dpwillis67@gmail.com by Rick Scott for Florida. If you no longer wish toreceive emails, please click here:unsubscribe .

name: Rudy Giuliani
email: news@iesp.conservativelibertywire.com
subject: Now, my primary residence could be “seized”
body: BREAKING: A federal judge is now considering… ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏  Dear Friend, On October 22, a federal judge decreed that I had 7days to hand over my home in New York – as well as my only car and sentimentalkeepsakes and heartfelt gifts that I collected over the span of 80 years. Ithought that would be the end of the damage… But with the election rightaround the corner, Kamala’s Deep State truly wants to ruin me with all they’vegot. They’re now considering dealing one final blow to me. A judge may noworder me to give up my remaining home in Florida – my primary residence. As mylawyer inquired: do they truly want me homeless? Over the last few days, we’veheard ridiculous claims about President Trump being a “fascist.” Let me tellyou what fascism is… Fascism is weaponizing the legal system to punish yourpolitical opponents. Fascism is having your home taken from you. Fascism istaking the law license away from your opponent’s lawyer. Fascism is trying toturn your enemies into political prisoners. I am living through theDemocrats’ fascism right now. I sincerely pray that freedom, justice, and thetruth prevail on Tuesday, November 5 – or the damage done to me will spreadlike wildfire to the rest of our great Republic. But, as I wrote to you in anearlier letter, the Bible reminds us that our earthly possessions will alwaysfade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us. The pursuit of truth,freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than a car or a home.Possessions come and go, but I couldNEVER SURRENDER my fight for freedom andfor what I know to betrue. I would be tone deaf if I didn’t acknowledge thattimes are tough right now for all Americans, not just me, so please stopreading here if you cannot give at this time. But funding my Legal DefenseTrust is my last remaining hope of fighting for my freedom and for the libertyand justice of all Americans. So, if you can, and, seriously, only if you can,please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy GiulianiFreedom Fund – as I keep fighting for my freedom and justice as Kamala’s DeepState tries to JAIL me for life. CONTRIBUTE $25 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE$100 CONTRIBUTE $250 CONTRIBUTE $500 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT Thank you andGod bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by RudyGiuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 unsubscribe |manage data preferences
tests.expected: RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND LEGAL DEFENSE TRUST

subject: when it matters most
body: |                                                                 | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe click here. | | ![Help us give free rides to go vote on Election Day!](https://actionnetwork.org/s3_files/uploads/data/000/950/842/original/SCOTUS.png) Peter,   It’s the weekend before Election Day, and there’s one thing everyone istalking about: voter turnout. With just three days to go, it all comes down towhich side gets more people to the polls.  That’s why it’s so important to give to The Collective PAC right now, when itmatters most.  **Our mission is to bring Black voters to the polls — to help people who might otherwise NOT be able to exercise their sacred right to vote.Chip in $20 to sponsor a round-trip ride to the polls or give whatever you can now to help us hit our $100,000 goal before Election Day→ ** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.  --- | DONATE $10 NOW » --- | DONATE $25 NOW » --- | DONATE $50 NOW » --- | DONATE $100 NOW » --- | DONATE $250 NOW » --- | OTHER » ---  With the race this tight, Black voters in key swing states like Michigan,Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, and Georgia will determine the presidency and controlof the House.  We don’t need to tell you how important this election is, Peter. We’re notjust choosing a president, we’re deciding whether America remains a free,democratic country or becomes a nation governed by a delusional dictator.  That’s why we won’t stop working to make sure every voter has the opportunityto get out and go vote. **Help The Collective PAC turn out voters in a BIG waycome Election Day but donating just $10or whatever you can right now.**If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donationwill be processed immediately. --- | DONATE $10 NOW » --- | DONATE $25 NOW » --- | DONATE $50 NOW » --- | DONATE $100 NOW » --- | DONATE $250 NOW » --- | OTHER » ---  Thanks for all your help,  The Collective PAC* * * ![](https://actionnetwork.org/s3_files/uploads/data/000/670/260/original/TCP_NBI_Stacked_Logo.png)The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitabledemocracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverseand talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented inpositions of power to create the policies necessary to progress ourcommunities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. Westrive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Blackcandidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system whilehelping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government thatwill truly be for the people and of the people. --- ![Twitter](https://actionnetwork.org/s3_files/uploads/data/000/527/084/original/unnamed-2.png)![Facebook](https://actionnetwork.org/s3_files/uploads/data/000/527/085/original/fb_back.png)![](https://actionnetwork.org/s3_files/uploads/data/000/527/086/original/Insta_black.png) ---  DONATE » --- DONATE MONTHLY » ---  To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate'scommittee. ---  ** Click here to unsubscribe from the Collective PAC's email list. **   ---    | | Sent via ActionNetwork.org. To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from The Collective PAC, please click here.  ---  ![](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/o/u001.ZbNyqOfLYPaP-d23SgKjnQ/4b4/IDRigVAlRYaAH6dQ8W0SeQ/ho.gif)

name: Mark Warner
email: info@markwarnerva.com
subject: I’ve spent a lot of time with Tim Kaine
body: Derek, I’ve had the honor of being Tim Kaine’s friend since we met at HarvardLaw School in 1980. For over 40 years, I’ve watched him wholeheartedly serveVirginia, first as mayor of Richmond, then as my Lieutenant Governor, andlater Governor, before serving together in the United States Senate. Thismeans I’ve spent a lot of time with Tim and gathered plenty of intel on him.So as I sat down to write this email asking you to support Senator Kaine’s re-election campaign, I found myself wondering exactly what I should say to youto assure you that Tim is the right choice to represent Virginia in Congress.And then it dawned on me: I want to tell you the top 3 things that annoy methe most about Tim Kaine. First off, Tim is way too nice! As a former civilrights attorney and missionary, he’s spent his entire career committed tosocial justice, being driven by the value of kindness and the belief that itcan change peoples’ lives. And he’s a genuinely good guy on top of that.Second, he’s ridiculously good at playing the harmonica. Seriously, he carriesthem in his briefcase, just in case a jam session breaks out on the Senatefloor. Third and finally, and I’ve said this before, he’s a deeply optimisticperson. Sometimes I can be a glass half-empty kind of guy, but Tim’s alwaysseems about ⅔ full. We need someone like Tim Kaine in the Senate. Tim’s valueof kindness and decency is what drives his undying dedication to serving thepeople of Virginia. And in a Congress plagued by partisan division, Tim’srelentless optimism keeps him from giving up in the crucial fights to protectvoting rights, safeguard a woman’s right to choose, and more. Now theharmonica… that one might not always translate to his work as a Senator, it’sjust really great to watch. The thing is, Tim’s seat could very well determineif the GOP takes control on Tuesday. Republicans are working overtime to ousthim and take back control of the Senate. So I’m asking you today if you cansplit a $5 donation between my campaign and Tim Kaine’s so we can send him,his kindness, impressive harmonica playing, and optimism back to the Senate?https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-240528-kaine?amount=5&refcode;=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Kainesplit_241101_T1_1 Ifyou've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation willbe automatically split between Tim Kaine and Mark Warner: EXPRESS DONATE $5https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-240528-kaine?express_lane=true&amount;=5&refcode;=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Kainesplit_241101_T1_1EXPRESS DONATE $10 https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-240528-kaine?express_lane=true&amount;=10&refcode;=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Kainesplit_241101_T1_1EXPRESS DONATE $25 https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-240528-kaine?express_lane=true&amount;=25&refcode;=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Kainesplit_241101_T1_1EXPRESS DONATE $50 https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-240528-kaine?express_lane=true&amount;=50&refcode;=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Kainesplit_241101_T1_1EXPRESS DONATE $100 https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-240528-kaine?express_lane=true&amount;=100&refcode;=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Kainesplit_241101_T1_1DONATE OTHER https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-240528-kaine?express_lane_other=true&refcode;=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Kainesplit_241101_T1_1I know Tim very well, and I know he’s not done building a Virginia that worksfor all. Help re-elect Senator Kaine and defend our Democratic Senate majorityby splitting a contribution today >>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-240528-kaine?amount=5&refcode;=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Kainesplit_241101_T1_1 Thankyou, Mark Contribute https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-240528-kaine?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Kainesplit_241101_T1_1 ---- Friends ofMark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United StatesTo unsubscribe, go to: unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/2Buh_-FbSkCM8ZUa-iiD5Q2?unsubscribedata=TR0MtEc6xaoG7SLnux5O2KQbXLJPt2%2FuNy2jUZMmKgz%2BD2innsxDKR3omYmOXCo6%2FJh44r3DrCgxLGhQeJmQLh8khb6WuNiorL%2BgBo%2Fysa3ffagHAVrsgb5C8Zp2HQlsBClSCZhrkqbw07wVP6PXxu8bTeX85QiM9sbZCsGUasRi0caCa5TR5A87ToDBLdhC6JcQ4Z2okmQHkj9J2bR7C%2F1XDdxSELZwmF0PoK%2B%2FGnXxlz30E8FULrZ%2FJQ2UjnY4ffDWWO4myYhBTWJKl%2FpG8svsTgJLkbXw3a0V6w1iPgLWpymHoxwHJZF%2FqIEabvx9RZMvaRtPC84A%2B2dNzcua%2FpyDBNCzomv1xrNaEfu5uabNx%2BiO1KXsE5W%2FtRrUXPC595tud8agFNC85d8eCA0n5rvnoOHisUYz%2Fij8QwVgbLU%3DPaid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Kimberly Guilfoyle
email: info@updates.marshablackburn.com
subject: We have a problem
body:                                                                                                                                                         https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=251be66599936e548f530d8d1461bc84a9583a52986efa852e190bf2b52397677091d9b5af09730a78363a4a8e3c6b185f5439bf90a09dc6a72e30fb39229d97I'll tell you what I said on my show: MARSHA BLACKBURN - THE FABULOUS SENATORFROM TENNESSEE - IS THE REAL DEAL, PEOPLE! She's a leader of our MAGAmovement. She's a tough-as-nails Conservative. And she's a wall standing inthe way of the Democrats' radical agenda. She's also up for re-election inNovember. Normally, she would soar through the finish line since she's a topally of President Trump… but unfortunately, we have a problem. Chuck Schumerrecruited a power-hungry, showboating socialist in a desperate attempt todestroy any opposition to his agenda and defeat Marsha. In fact, Marsha'sopponent just joined forces with Hollywood elite types to turbocharge hernegative campaign to flip Tennessee. Let me say this in no uncertain terms: Ifthis radical socialist manages to flip Tennessee, our path to winning back theSenate Majority will COMPLETELY VANISH.https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=251be66599936e548f530d8d1461bc84a9583a52986efa852e190bf2b52397677091d9b5af09730a78363a4a8e3c6b185f5439bf90a09dc6a72e30fb39229d97So, with all that being said, I respectfully ask you for the FIRST TIME todonate right now to Marsha Blackburn's re-election campaign.https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=251be66599936e548f530d8d1461bc84a9583a52986efa852e190bf2b52397677091d9b5af09730a78363a4a8e3c6b185f5439bf90a09dc6a72e30fb39229d97PLEASE JOIN ME: DONATE NOW I don't send these types of emails very often. Ifyou're like me, these types of political emails kind of drive you crazy. Butthis is no ordinary request. Marsha Blackburn is exactly the kind of strong,patriotic conservative President Trump needs in the U.S. Senate. No surprisehere, but Marsha's socialist opponent turned to big liberal names to helpbankroll her campaign. Luckily, we have you on our side. If just 30% respondto my email, Marsha's socialist opponent will have no shot at EVER flippingthis key Senate seat. But first, I need your help right now. Please. I'mpersonally asking for your help.https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=251be66599936e548f530d8d1461bc84a9583a52986efa852e190bf2b52397677091d9b5af09730a78363a4a8e3c6b185f5439bf90a09dc6a72e30fb39229d97So, I hope that's enough to convince you. If it's not, I fear we could loseTennessee - and the ENTIRE U.S. Senate along with it. For America, KimberlyGuilfoyle Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraisingcommittee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, andTennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. Blackburn TennesseeVictory Fund PO Box 3750 Brentwood, TN 37024 This message reflects theopinions and representations of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund. body: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_110124_thankyou [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_110124_thankyou] Hey Friend, With just FOUR[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_110124_thankyou] days left until Election Day, my heart isfull of gratitude. Thursday marked our final end-of-month deadline for thecycle, and once again, you all showed up beyond my highest hopes. Thanks toyou, we hit our fundraising goal, and, for that, I can’t thank you enough. Ourcampaign has been a true community effort from day one, and that community isstronger than ever. But Friend, as we head into these final days, we need tokeep pushing with everything we’ve got. Right now, our greatest strength isour organizing — talking to friends, family, neighbors, everyone — to makesure CA-12 knows what’s at stake. This isn’t just about one election. It’sabout safeguarding our democracy, standing up for CA-12, and championing thevalues that unite us. Let’s win this,folks. name: Jim Jordan
email: patriot@e.youramerica.news
subject: Our final chance
body: This is our last deadline before Election Day  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏ ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏ ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏ ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  | --- | | |  Friend, I just need a second of your time.  I'm not going to beat around the bush. We're in big trouble, and we don't havemuch time to fix it. subject: Final plea from a DOZEN top Republicans
body: The Democrats are so close to winning enough battleground races to takecomplete control of our country. We’re fighting back with everything we’ve gotbut we desperately need your help. Vivek Ramaswamy asked. Lara Trump asked.Donald Trump Jr. asked. Michael Whatley asked. Mike Pompeo asked. KellyanneConway asked. John Kennedy asked. Kimberly Guilfoyle asked. Sean Spicer asked.Newt Gingrich asked. Sarah Huckabee Sanders asked.                                                                                                                                                         Tulsi Gabbard asked. VivekRamaswamy asked. Lara Trump asked. Donald Trump Jr. asked. Mike Pompeo asked.Michael Whatley asked. Kellyanne Conway asked. John Kennedy asked. NewtGingrich asked. Kimberly Guilfoyle asked. Sean Spicer asked. Sarah HuckabeeSanders asked. Now we're following up ONE LAST TIME because our final deadlineis just hours away – and according to the latest FEC reports, Conservativesgot annihilated in fundraising! As a direct result of falling behind, we maybe forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVESin the final days of the election!This is an emergency, but don’t take ourword for it – here’s how Axios broke the news: At this point, we desperatelyneed all Patriots to pitch in a few bucks right now or the Democrats couldtake complete control. That’s why Majority Leader Steve Scalise cut thisfinal plea for help before it’s too late: Last Call: Add $250 Here >> LastCall: Add $100 Here >> Last Call: Add $50 Here >> Last Call: Add $35 Here >>Kamala Harris just bragged about raising $1 billion. She cut a $15 millioncheck to destroy down-ballot Conservatives. Now we’re facing our final monthlydeadline and we’re coming up short. The Democrats are so close to winningenough battleground races to take complete control of our country. We’refighting back with everything we’ve got but we desperately need your help.YOUR SUPPORT will help keep our ads on the airwaves. YOUR SUPPORT will sendemergency resources to key swing states. YOUR SUPPORT will make thedifference between victory and defeat. Please: If there was EVER a time topitch in a few bucks before an election, it's right here and right now. Thiselection is too close to call. As of now, the future of America relies onPatriots like you stepping up before the deadline. The final cutoff is closingin. We’re trailing dangerously behind. But you can help save the day as longas you step up now. Last Call: Please Donate Here >> Thanks for all you do,Official Republican Communication It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise.I’m respectfully asking you to fill out my ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN at yourearliest convenience. It’s important. I want to have your goals, yourconcerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. What wouldyou like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? STARTHERE >> Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized byand to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise iscommitted to defending our Conservative House majority and electingConservatives across the country. body: Tina for Oregon [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92654/images/TinaForOregon-Logo-FullColor-white.png] Hi Peter, it’s Janelle Bynum. I’ve really enjoyed hitting the campaign trail and meeting with voters who are fired up and ready to win this race. We’re one step closer to flipping OR-05 and taking back the House. But here's the bad news : We’re up against millions of dollars in spending by deep-pocketed Republicans. My opponent, Lori Chavez-DeRemer, is backed by Republican special interest groups who are willing to spend whatever it takes to hold this seat. As they put more money into this race, we need a flood of support to fight back and make sure we’re not getting drowned out on the airwaves. That's why I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation between Tina Kotek and me today to help us keep our ads on the air and continue to reach undecided voters? With everything we’re up against, we can’t afford to fall short. Not when this race could decide control of the House. → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-bynum?] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Janelle Bynum and Tina Kotek will go through immediately: CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-bynum?express_lane=true&amount;=10] CHIP IN $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-bynum?express_lane=true&amount;=25] CHIP IN $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-bynum?express_lane=true&amount;=50] CHIP IN $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-bynum?express_lane=true&amount;=100] CHIP IN $250 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-bynum?express_lane=true&amount;=250] ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-bynum] Thank you, Janelle Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 tinafororegon.com [https://www.tinafororegon.com/] | info@tinafororegon.com [info@tinafororegon.com] Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . name: Pramila Jayapal
email: info@e.pramilaforcongress.com
subject: A moment of light and possibility 🎇
body:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    [https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241101-4478-footer&t;=1001&akid;=4478%2E420207%2EstGsbt]Pramila Jayapal Peter, This week, South Asians across the world arecelebrating Diwali, a festival that speaks to the deepest hopes of ourcommunity. Also known as the Festival of Lights, it’s a moment ofillumination, of connection, and of profound possibility. And this year, itjust so happens to coincide with an election in which we’ll have the chance toelect the first-ever South Asian as President of the United States. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241101-2?refcode=em20241101-4478&refcode2;=4478_420207_stGsbt&akid;=4478%2E420207%2EstGsbt][IMG] On election night in 2016, Kamala Harris and I broke barriers together.I became the first South Asian woman ever elected to the House ofRepresentatives, and she became the first South Asian woman ever elected tothe Senate. Now we stand at the brink of an even more transformative moment.It’s not just a political milestone. It's a testament to the journey ofgenerations of people who have worked, dreamed, and persevered to get us tothis moment. Our community's story is one of resilience — of voices thatrefuse to be dimmed and of traditions that continue to shine brightly acrosscontinents. We see this in the vibrant celebrations happening in homes andcommunities across the nation. In the glow of clay lamps, in the warmth ofshared meals, in the sparkle of joy that connects us. To our diverse SouthAsian community — Hindus, Muslims, Sikhs, Christians, Jains — this is a momentto honor our collective strength. To recognize the challenges we face, thefears that sometimes shadow our experiences, and also the power we have touplift, to support, and to create meaningful change. As we gather with familyand friends, let us recommit ourselves to a future of true belonging. Whereevery voice matters, where every story is heard, where our collective lightcan transform our shared landscape. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241101-2?refcode=em20241101-4478amount=3&refcode2;=4478_420207_stGsbt&akid;=4478%2E420207%2EstGsbt]If you’re with us in the fight to build that future, consider splitting adonation between my campaign and Kamala Harris today. We need your support toget out the vote and elect the first South Asian president on Tuesday. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241101-2?amount=3&refcode;=em20241101-4478&refcode2;=4478_420207_stGsbt&akid;=4478%2E420207%2EstGsbt]Contribute From my home to yours, Happy Diwali, Peter. With hope andsolidarity, Pramila Jayapal Contribute to Pramila Jayapal:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241101-4478-footer&t;=1002&refcode2;=4478_420207_stGsbt&akid;=4478%2E420207%2EstGsbtThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important wayfor us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. body: https://www.jahanahayes.com/ [https://www.jahanahayes.com/] Friend, here isthe situation: Allies of Donald Trump have poured resources into CT-05 as anew poll shows that Congresswoman Jahana Hayes is barely leading, 49%-46% ,within the polling margin of error. All while Trump is doubling down on hisrhetoric, excusing the January 6 insurrection, and threatening to use the U.S.military on his political opponents whom he calls “the enemy from within.” IfMAGA Republicans flip this seat red, it could destroy our hopes of taking backthe House — and send a dangerously unfit Republican to Congress instead of afighter for our communities like Jahana. Here is the solution: Early voting inConnecticut is underway. We have a busy week ahead of us organizing across thedistrict. We could use the extra resources to reach more voters if you canspare a few bucks today. Can you contribute $10 or any amount to help us turnout voters and reelect Jahana Hayes? subject: Changing our system one step at a time
body: Help me to transform our relation to government                           [1]Hopefully, you have learned about my plan to phase out our welfare andentitlement programs to replace them with a universal basic income of $16,000per year for everyone 21 and over. Even if you don’t agree with all thedetails, we need to start discussing solutions to the problems that my planwill solve: a dysfunctional welfare system, the looming insolvency of SocialSecurity and Medicare, and our mounting national debt. Right now, I am theonly one even attempting to think about these crucial issues and offering apossible plan. It is of course an ambitious plan, and things will obviouslynot change overnight, and if elected I would only be able to take the firststeps toward the discussions that would lead to such solutions. But with yoursupport, I can start on the work of turning our country around. Without it, wewill have to wait that much longer to have these discussions, and meanwhileour debts will keep increasing, making solutions that much more difficult toimplement. Please add your voice to mine so that we can start on the processof real transformation that will change all of our lives, returning to us ourfreedom and prosperity. If you have not voted, please do so. Please alsoconsider a donation to my campaign. My ads have begun running on southernCalifornia TV stations, on streaming video, through text messages, and throughsocial media. You can also see my ad on my website at DavidPanforCongress.com[2]. Now is the time that I need your help to achieve these goals for you andyour family. Help me by contributing $5, $10, $100, which can go directly intospreading my message more broadly on these platforms. You can go toDavidPanforCongress.com [2] to contribute and raise your voice to join mine.Thank you for your support! www.DavidPanForCongress.com [3] Paid for by DavidPan for Congress 2024 [3] unsubscribe [4] 3843 S. subject: Second Chance - Free Viewing of Zurawski v Texas
body: I HIGHLY recommend you watch this documentary this weekend. View this email inyour browser (https://mailchi.mp/987033b5a265/amanda-zurawski-vs-texas-12709419?e=ebba716312) https://www.theresa4texas.com Hi Friend, ** Ifyou didn't get a chance to watch the documentary, Zurawski v Texas, I HIGHLYrecommend you watch it this weekend.------------------------------------------------------------ ** The Center forReproductive Rights sums it up:------------------------------------------------------------ "In the newdocumentary feature film Zurawski v Texas, independent filmmakers Maisie Crowand Abbie Perrault show the stark and terrifying reality of what it means tobe pregnant in a U.S. state that has banned abortion—and the bravery, grit anddetermination that it takes to speak out. Crow and Perrault followed threeTexas women who were denied medically necessary abortion care—Amanda Zurawski,Samantha Casiano, and Dr. Austin Dennard—as they brought their stories andbattled their case up to the Texas Supreme Court, with the help of the Centerfor Reproductive Rights’ Senior Staff Attorney Molly Duane." Watch Zurawski vTexas for free Nov 2 and 3 here(https://watch.eventive.org/togetherfilms/play/670db1d13a247100e803df13/670db1dc3f8905002cc42691)** If you are able to give, I am sure the Center for Reproductive Rights coulduse your donation.------------------------------------------------------------ Donate the theCenter for Reproductive Rights here (https://reproductiverights.org/) Theyhave cases across the country and could use our support while they fightagainst the extreme abortion bans that put women's lives in jeopardy. ** Ifyou haven't voted yet, today is the last day of early voting and Tuesday isElection Day. ------------------------------------------------------------Thanks for your help. ** Onwards,------------------------------------------------------------ ** Theresa------------------------------------------------------------ Donate(https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abrighterfuturefortexas) Volunteer(https://www.theresa4texas.com/get-involved) Issues(https://www.theresa4texas.com/what-theresa-stands-for) Shop(https://store.theresa4texas.com) https://www.theresa4texas.com Follow me onsocial media - and share with your friends and family!https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61552530122152https://www.instagram.com/theresa4texas https://www.twitter.com/theresa4texashttps://tiktok.com/theresa4texashttps://www.youtube.com/channel/UCyd_ZE7lgKTjDchvDRg4A9g Pol. body: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_lbr_fr_q42024 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_lbr_fr_q42024] Hey folks – it’s Gretchen Whitmer, the governor of Michigan. As we get closer to Election Day, I wanted to shine a light on Lisa Blunt Rochester, the Congresswoman from Delaware. Right now, she is in a heated race to become Delaware’s next Senator. In a minute, I’ll explain why you should chip in to support Lisa’s historic campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_lbr_fr_q42024] SUPPORT LISA → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_lbr_fr_q42024] Lisa’s career as a public servant epitomizes the definition of what it means to be a leader and champion for everyone. Time and time again, she has helped create and pass meaningful legislation to build up our middle class, protect our seniors, and defend our voting and reproductive rights. In short, Lisa’s mission of Bright Hope is one she hopes to bring to the Senate. But her self-funding opponent would rather spend nearly a million dollars to keep his campaign afloat and defend the overturning of Roe. I wish I was joking on that last point. The scary thing about all of this is that Delaware will be crucial to the Democrats’ hopes of protecting their Senate majority. With a one-seat majority on the line, we need to do everything we can to lock this seat down and make Lisa the first Black and woman senator from Delaware. Folks – Election Day will be here before you know it. And in order to stop Trump, Vance, and Project 2025, we need to support Lisa Blunt Rochester by chipping in $10 or more to her campaign today. Exercising your right to vote is the cornerstone of ourdemocracy, and being involved in the democratic process at every level isequally important. I know your contributions to this election extend farbeyond just casting a ballot, which is why I want to extend my heartfeltgratitude to all the volunteers, supporters, and donors who have powered ourcampaign. To put all this hard work into perspective, just last week, Idelivered over 7,000 handwritten postcards to the post office, and in total,our campaign has sent out more than 50,000 hand-addressed letters andpostcards. Reflecting back, I am truly inspired by the remarkable supportwe’ve received from Republicans, Democrats, and Independents as I seek torepresent all of us in District 28. https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-jeremy-shaffer-42e7f3c5/website?utm_medium=emailit&utm;_campaign=20241101_nv1&utm;_source=mc&utm;_content=saHave A Plan To Vote Be sure to verify your polling location by clicking thebutton below. If you have a completed mail in ballot be sure you deliver it tothe County Office Building (542 Forbes Ave, Pittsburgh, PA 15219) before 8:00PM on November 5th. POLL FINDER(https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/Pages/PollingPlaceInfo.aspx) Help onElection Day We have 26 polling locations open for 13 hours each day (from 7AM to 8 PM). If you can spare a few hours to distribute campaign information,please reply to this email, and we’ll coordinate a convenient time and placefor you. https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-jeremy-shaffer-42e7f3c5/website?utm_medium=emailit&utm;_campaign=20241101_nv1&utm;_source=mc&utm;_content=saPick Up Your Election Day Supplies If you’ve signed up to assist on ElectionDay, please stop by the Republican office to collect your instructions,supplies, and a Shaffer T-shirt. Our office is located at 120 Church Rd,Wexford, PA 15090, and will be open during the following hours: ● Friday(11/1): 3 PM - 6 PM ● Saturday (11/2): 1 PM - 9 PM ● Sunday (11/3): 2 PM - 9PM ● Monday (11/4): 11 AM - 8 PM If you are unable to pick up your items,we’re happy to deliver them to you. Just call or text Connor McDonald at724-355-2045. Election Night Celebration: Join us for our Election Night Partyat the North Park Clubhouse, starting at 8:30 PM after the polls close onTuesday. The clubhouse is located on Route 8, across from Richland Mall (nearShop ‘N Save/Kohl’s) at 5301 Ranalli Rd, Gibsonia, PA 15044. name: David Pan
email: david@davidpanforcongress.org
subject: Changing our system one step at a time
body: Help me to transform our relation to government                           [1]Hopefully, you have learned about my plan to phase out our welfare andentitlement programs to replace them with a universal basic income of $16,000per year for everyone 21 and over. Even if you don’t agree with all thedetails, we need to start discussing solutions to the problems that my planwill solve: a dysfunctional welfare system, the looming insolvency of SocialSecurity and Medicare, and our mounting national debt. Right now, I am theonly one even attempting to think about these crucial issues and offering apossible plan. It is of course an ambitious plan, and things will obviouslynot change overnight, and if elected I would only be able to take the firststeps toward the discussions that would lead to such solutions. But with yoursupport, I can start on the work of turning our country around. Without it, wewill have to wait that much longer to have these discussions, and meanwhileour debts will keep increasing, making solutions that much more difficult toimplement. Please add your voice to mine so that we can start on the processof real transformation that will change all of our lives, returning to us ourfreedom and prosperity. If you have not voted, please do so. Please alsoconsider a donation to my campaign. My ads have begun running on southernCalifornia TV stations, on streaming video, through text messages, and throughsocial media. You can also see my ad on my website at DavidPanforCongress.com[2]. Now is the time that I need your help to achieve these goals for you andyour family. Help me by contributing $5, $10, $100, which can go directly intospreading my message more broadly on these platforms. You can go toDavidPanforCongress.com [2] to contribute and raise your voice to join mine.Thank you for your support! www.DavidPanForCongress.com [3] Paid for by DavidPan for Congress 2024 [3] unsubscribe [4] 3843 S. View it in your web browser --- | | |  --- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Gwen Walz
email: info@contact.kamalaharris.com
subject: I am kindly asking folks like you to chip in for the first time today. Will you make a $47 contribution to elect Kamala and Tim and defeat Trump?
body: We can turn the page on the chaos and division of Donald Trump. | | |                                                                                                                                    --- ![Harris forPresident](https://actionnetwork.org/user_files/user_files/000/111/764/original/HFP-Walz-SingleColor-HarrisBlue.png) ![](https://actionnetwork.org/s3_files/uploads/data/000/950/644/original/gwen_walz_square.jpg) Four days, Peter. Just four days to determine the next four years. **We can turn the page on the chaos and division of Donald Trump -- but not without your help reaching every last voter and getting them to the polls.** So I am kindly asking folks like you to chip in for the first time today. Will you make a $47 contribution to elect Kamala and Tim and defeat Trump? It wasn’t that many weeks ago when Tim got a call -- _the call_ \-- from Vice President Harris asking him to join this ticket. Ever since then, it’s been a whirlwind. I have traveled across the country meeting all different kinds of voters: proud Democrats who vote frequently, folks who are still deciding, folks who don’t vote in every election -- and yes, Republicans. **Everywhere I go, people are fed up with Donald Trump and fired up for Kamala and Tim’s new way forward.** But I won’t mince words, Peter. We remain the underdogs in this race. Nothing less than our very democracy is at stake. And we must win. In an election as close as this one, grassroots supporters like you will make the difference. With time running out, please give your first $47 to power our critical voter outreach efforts in these final days. _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | $47 >> --- | $75 >> --- | $100 >> --- | $250 >> --- | $500 >> --- | Other >> ---  Thank you. It is a privilege to be with you in this fight. It truly is.Thank you,Gwen          * * *| | DONATE --- | TAKE ACTION --- | SHOP ---  * * *This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. Thank you so much for being asupporter. But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you’d like tounsubscribe from all Harris for President emails, you can **click here**. name: James Blair, National Political Director

subject: 72-Hour Strike Force — Get Out and Vote
body: Stand with Trump (links inside)                                                | | | |   --- | ![mailtimers.com](https://gifcdn.com/e9m60r3gb9j6go38d9h.gif) --- |  --- | | ![Trump Force 47 Logo](https://cdn.nucleusfiles.com/d2/d2973c4d-3087-4cf0-82b1-4fdde910ec4e/trump-force-full-color.jpg) --- | --- ![](https://cdn.nucleusfiles.com/9c/9c431aba-a962-45ba-81ce-2d25dc16bdd0/4-days-out-thumbnail.png) Hello Friend, Election Day is almost here—now’s the time to take action! Join the STRIKEFORCE in our 72-hour push to victory. Let's get out and knock on doors, makecalls, and rally every volunteer to turn out a winning vote count. Everysingle vote matters—let’s mobilize and make this election TOO BIG TO RIG! **VOTE EARLY!** Election Integrity protects our vote. body: Steve Daines for Senate You can make a huge impact in less than 30 seconds.Fellow American, the Senate majority will come down to just 7 races: MontanaOhio Michigan Nevada Pennsylvania Wisconsin Arizona Here's the bad news,Fellow American. Our candidates are being outraised by millions in thesestates. TAKE BACK THE SENATE ⇒ HELP 7 RACES But this isn't just about theSenate. If our Senate races are successful, it will help DonaldTrump DEFEAT Kamala Harris where it matters most. I know what we're upagainst, Fellow American. Democrats are raising and spending millions morethan us, but we have a better message. Kamala Harris has done NOTHING tosecure our border as Vice President. Donald Trump and a Republican Senate willBUILD THE WALL. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris were responsible for ourdisastrous Afghanistan withdrawal.Republican candidates like Tim Sheehy, SamBrown, and Dave McCormick actually have SERVED overseas. Kamala Harris andSenate Democrats want to PACK our courts with liberal judges. As President,Donald Trump and a Republican Senate confirmed more conservative judges andJustices than ANY OTHER PRESIDENT IN HISTORY. It's clear that we need aRepublican White House and Senate, but we also need your help to make that areality. The map is on our side, but the financials are not. Will you make asplit donation to help President Trump, Tim Sheehy (MT), Bernie Moreno (OH),Mike Rogers (MI), Sam Brown (NV), Dave McCormick (PA), Eric Hovde (WI), andKari Lake (AZ)? There's too much at stake to sit on the sideline with 4 daysleft. Thank you, Steve Daines TAKE BACK THE SENATE ⇒ HELP 7 RACES SteveDaines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of fourserving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to alwaysputting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington andfights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get ourcountry back on track.Chip in $10 or more to help Steve today! <> SenatorSteve Daines Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana Unsubscribe

name: AOC
email: speak@ocasiocortez.com
subject: I’ll tell you what I believe:
body: [1]Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress We live in a constant state ofinjustice. We are always struggling against systems of mass incarceration, ofextreme income inequality, of late stage capitalism. Those conditions doexist. But one thing that I think is important is that we must mobilize for anaffirmative vision for this country — we can’t just mobilize on fear. We needto be clear about what the stakes are. We do. But I don’t believe in a ‘fearonly’ approach. I’ll tell you what I believe: I believe in a bare minimum. $15minimum wage needed to be passed several years ago. I believe in guaranteed,improved, and expanded Medicare to every single American. We can’t give up.I’ve been in that place when I was a waitress. I did spend some time giving upand being cynical and saying, “F*ck this.” And you know what it got us?Nothing. Depression, cynicism, and a sense of purposelessness. Giving up is aprivilege that people just can’t afford. Movements wax and wane. And there aretimes when it feels like our power is waning, and it’s really easy to take ourball and go home. But the strength of a movement really depends on thedurability of it, and the commitment to it. That black pill of cynicism is thedeath of movements, not the birth of them. In solidarity, Alexandria [https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241101.DCJTFE&refcode;=em20241101-7501-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts;=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t;=1001&akid;=7501%2E2526796%2ERSo1sN]Help us continue the fight by making a grassroots donation. [https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241101.DCJTFE&refcode;=em20241101-7501-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts;=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t;=1020&akid;=7501%2E2526796%2ERSo1sN]Contribute $5 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the mostimportant way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for readingto the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check,please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080,Corona, NY 11368. name: Rebecca Cooke
email: info@cookeforwisconsin.com
subject: The good and the bad:
body: Peter, I wanted to update you on where things stand in WI-03 with somepositive news and some more concerning developments. But first, I have to ask:will you chip in to help us reach our final pre-election goal of raising$20,000 from grassroots supporters? We’re starting off well, but still have aways to go over the next couple of days.Donate>>https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooke-q4-2024?refcode=em-11.2.24-all-1-aNow, the good news: We have an ever-so-slight lead in the latest polls in ourrace. Plus, election analysts have shifted the race slightly in our favor.These updates show the momentum we’ve built throughout this people-poweredcampaign. And I’m thankful for every single supporter who helped us get tothis point. But we can’t get complacent, Peter, because here’s the bad news:We are being heavily outspent by Derrick Van Orden and his extremist, deep-pocketed allies and super PACs. They’ve just doubled their ad buys in the mostcompetitive media markets in WI-03. That’s concerning because we need to winthose communities to prevail in three days. Here’s the bottom line: we need asurge of grassroots support NOW to counter Van Orden’s ad push and big-dollardonors as we enter the final stretch of this race. Will you contributewhatever you can today to help flip WI-03? What matters most is that we get asmany people donating as we can, because it adds up fast. Donate >>https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooke-q4-2024?refcode=em-11.2.24-all-1-aThank you, Peter. Your support will help us win in three days. Rebecca ###Paid for by Cooke for Congress Cooke for Congress PO Box 1846 Eau Claire, WI54702 United States Rebecca Cooke is a small business and nonprofit leader whohas focused her career on building community and serving others. She was bornand raised on an Eau Claire dairy farm and was appointed by Governor TonyEvers to the Wisconsin Economic Development Corporation. The Cook PoliticalReport is calling Nevada the "most perilous" battleground for Democrats – anda new poll shows me tied 48-48 with my Trump-endorsed opponent. Nevadans havealready started voting, and we urgently need to ramp up our operation soDemocrats can win this state – but we just don’t have the resources in thebank to do that right now. name: Carville, James
email: info@sherrodbrown.com
subject: Every single Democrat NEEDS to pay attention to Sherrod's Senate race RIGHT NOW
body: Friend, I'm about to ask you to chip in every dollar you can to help SherrodBrown win in Ohio and defend our Democratic Senate majority – but first, letme explain why this is so damn important for ALL of us. But hell, if you wantto click here and chip in right away, I'm not gonna stop you.https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sherrod-brown-email-wr-24?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode;=jtk3725-fr-text I'll get right into it:Democrats have a razor-thin Senate majority, and we're facing a NIGHTMARESenate map. There's a strong chance it will all come down to Ohio, which meansSherrod is the ONLY thing standing between us and a Republican Senate. Friend,I've worked on campaigns for a long time. I've been on the winning side andthe losing side. If there's one thing I know, it's that money makes a BIGdifference. I wish it weren't the case, but it is. TV ads, phone banks, yardsigns, campaign events in every corner of the state – it all adds up FAST.That's why I'm so terrified right now. If this were a simple battle betweengood and evil, I wouldn't be worried – Sherrod is as good a leader as Ohioanshave ever had. He fights harder for workers than anybody I know, and he's notafraid to take on the big banks and corporations that are making things harderfor the middle class. But money muddies the waters, and his opponent has got aton of it. He's poured A TON into his own campaign, and there's a lot morewhere that came from. Sherrod simply doesn't have that kind of money – sothat's where this grassroots team needs to come in and have his back, friend.I know Sherrod can win this critical race and keep the Senate blue, but ONLYIF we all come together to give him the resources he needs. So I'm asking:Will you rush $5, $25, or even $50 to help him win in Ohio and defend ourSenate majority? https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sherrod-brown-email-wr-24?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode;=jtk3725-fr-text Thanks for doingyour part – there's simply no other option if we want to save the Senate! –James Carville -------- This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Tim Walz
email: info@tinaforminnesota.com
subject: Let’s leave it all out on the field
body: Folks, this is Tim Walz. I couldn't be prouder to be on this ticket and tohelp make Kamala Harris the next president of the United States. There’s a lotmore I want to say, but before I continue, I’m hoping you’ll split acontribution between Tina Smith and our campaign today. With just four daysleft in this election, we need to leave it all out on the field. Everycontribution will make a huge difference.[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em-harris24?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com]If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your splitdonation to Tina Smith and the Harris-Walz campaign will go throughimmediately: CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em-harris24?express_lane=true&amount;=10&email;=dpwillis67@gmail.com] CHIP IN $25NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em-harris24?express_lane=true&amount;=25&email;=dpwillis67@gmail.com] CHIP IN $50NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em-harris24?express_lane=true&amount;=50&email;=dpwillis67@gmail.com] CHIP IN$100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em-harris24?express_lane=true&amount;=100&email;=dpwillis67@gmail.com] CHIP IN$250 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em-harris24?express_lane=true&amount;=250&email;=dpwillis67@gmail.com] ANOTHERAMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em-harris24?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com] Growing up in a small town like Butte,Nebraska, you learn to take care of each other. The family down the road maynot think, pray, or love like you, but they are your neighbors and you lookout for them. Now we know that Donald Trump, JD Vance, and MAGA Republicanshave a different vision of America. When they talk about freedom they mean thegovernment should have the freedom to invade every corner of our life. Take itfrom a small-town guy: they know nothing about what working people need.That's not what we do in Minnesota. We don’t attack our neighbors’ rights. Wewelcome everyone in, and we lift each other up. My friend Tina Smithunderstands this. And she works hard every day to ensure Minnesotans’ voicesare heard in the United States Senate. That’s what this campaign is about:working together to build a future where everyone has the opportunity not justto get by, but to get ahead. Where workers come first, health care and housingare human rights, and the government stays the hell out of your bedroom. Butwe need you in this fight with us. Will you split a donation of $10, orwhatever works for you right now, between Tina Smith and our campaign so wecan continue working together and defend our values up and down the ballot inNovember? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em-harris24?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount;=10] Four days to go. Let’s leaveit all on the field. subject: Not what you want to see
body: [ https://go.bobcasey.com/go/182?t=1001&akid;=4743%2E552475%2EOvvHpE ]BobCasey for Senate This isn’t what you want to see, Peter. Another public polljust released shows Bob behind David McCormick. It’s the second one in twoweeks with us trailing. That’s the first time we’ve seen two back-to-backpolls with us down. You probably didn’t wake up this morning thinking “Gee,I’m going to donate to Bob Casey.” But with only 5 days left, we’re asking ifyou can chip in before it’s too late. Pennsylvania will come down to just ahandful of votes. We made you a personal link so we can thank everyone whodonates: [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241031-8?refcode=em20241031-8&refcode2;=4743_552475_OvvHpE&akid;=4743%2E552475%2EOvvHpE]https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241031-8?refcode=em20241031-8-dpwillis67@gmail.com We always knew thisrace would come down to the wire. name: Ted Cruz
email: info@standingstrongamerica.com
subject: I’m standing alone
body: We’re in real trouble- here’s why We’re in real trouble- here’s why Peter,Here is the situation. Senator Chuck Schumer (D-NY) the powerful MajorityLeader for the Senate Democrats has directed his forces to inject millions andmillions of dollars into Texas to defeat me and flip Texas brightblue. Schumerhas said they will spend over one-hundred million dollars to defeat me. Otherradical leftwing groups and National Democrat Party committees are jumpinginto the fray as well-just flooding us with attack ads, flyers, and boots onthe ground… But here’s the worst part: The National Party is not coming tosave us. I am standing alone against this massive progressive onslaught. Weare getting almost NO HELP from Mitch McConnell. And the major RepublicanSenate Super PAC has no operations or ads running in Texas… That’s why I’mcalling on all grassroots conservatives from Maine to Marfa for help… RUSHHELP HERE >> The Washington DC Party Establishment doesn’t want a grassrootsconservative like me in the Senate- they never have, and their lack of helpduring the fight of my life is proof! I need YOUR help. Not because ourfundraising hasn’t been successful- we’re doing well, and thousands of Texansand patriots from all over are stepping in to give generously. Many are givingfor the very first time, while others have given every month this year. Butwith no air cover. I'm forced to ask for urgent help. We can’t lose Texas- andright now we’re in real trouble. STAND WITH TEXAS & SAVE AMERICA RIGHT NOW >>Thank you for standing with me. Ted Cruz DONATE >> Paid for by Ted Cruz forSenate 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 Unsubscribe

name: Adam Schiff

subject: Trump called me “total scum”
body: [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid;=8121%2E5257348%2EnSb5EY ]Adam Schiff for Senate Derek, stop me if you’ve heard this before: Donald Trump’s campaign claims that he’s a serious candidate, taking the rally stage to defend his record and talk about his agenda. But he gets introduced by racist, sexist, divisive speakers. Who ramble almost as much as he does. When Trump takes the stage, he launches into an incoherent, meandering speech, lacking in policy proposals, and chock full of lies and attacks against his political opponents, including me. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=nov2024_abs_em.SALZ0e&refcode;=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20241101_PM1_V1_S1&email;=&t;=1004&akid;=8121%2E5257348%2EnSb5EY ]That’s exactly what happened yesterday at his rally in New Mexico. Derek, the attacks don’t phase me anymore, but with precious little time left for undecided voters to make their decisions at the ballot box, we can’t let their final impression of me come from a Trump screed. Please rush a contribution to boost our voter outreach in the final days of this election. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2024_abs_em.XLxVQB&refcode;=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20241101_PM1_V1_S1&email;=&amount;=10&t;=1005&akid;=8121%2E5257348%2EnSb5EY ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2024_abs_em.XLxVQB&refcode;=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20241101_PM1_V1_S1&email;=&amount;=25&t;=1006&akid;=8121%2E5257348%2EnSb5EY ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2024_abs_em.XLxVQB&refcode;=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20241101_PM1_V1_S1&email;=&amount;=50&t;=1007&akid;=8121%2E5257348%2EnSb5EY ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2024_abs_em.XLxVQB&refcode;=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20241101_PM1_V1_S1&email;=&amount;=100&t;=1008&akid;=8121%2E5257348%2EnSb5EY ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2024_abs_em.XLxVQB&refcode;=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20241101_PM1_V1_S1&email;=&amount;=250&t;=1009&akid;=8121%2E5257348%2EnSb5EY ]EXPRESS DONATE $250 [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2024_abs_em.7WX_lH&refcode;=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20241101_PM1_V1_S1&email;=&t;=1010&akid;=8121%2E5257348%2EnSb5EY ]ANOTHER AMOUNT [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2024_abs_em.7WX_lH&refcode;=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20241101_PM1_V1_S1&t;=1011&akid;=8121%2E5257348%2EnSb5EY ]Trump attacking Adam at a rally in New Mexico “This is an election for the biggest and toughest job in history. There’s no tougher job than being president, and we get hit from the enemy inside. You know that, right? We get hit by the Adam Schiffs of the world. He's scum, total scum. They made up Russia, Russia, Russia hoax. They made up all the impeachment hoaxes. They make it up. They're bad people.” This is the closing message of Trump’s campaign. Ridiculous lies and smears against me, or his other “enemies.” While Trump pretends he’s a victim. If we want to talk about who is capable of taking on the biggest and toughest job in history, I’m going with a proven champion for the underdogs, a sharp prosecutor, a skilled communicator, and an empathetic, kind, humble leader — that’s Kamala Harris. Derek, we have just 4 days to deliver our message to voters across California. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=nov2024_abs_em.SALZ0e&refcode;=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20241101_PM1_V1_S1&email;=&t;=1012&akid;=8121%2E5257348%2EnSb5EY ]Will you rush in a contribution before our final GOTV weekend to make sure we reach the voters we need to turn out in droves in support of Kamala Harris, Tim Walz, and Democrats up and down the ballot? email: kg@kirstengillibrand.com
subject: I have a big favor to ask:
body: Friend, I have a big favor to ask: If just 5% of folks reading this email chipped in $5, we would hit our $500,000 goal in no time. Can I count on you to step up with a split donation of $10 today to ensure my team and I have the resources we need to push back against the $40 million worth of attack ads Ted Cruz and his allies are running against us right now? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_colinallred?refcode=jtk5609-bu-text&amounts;=5,25,50,100,250 Last time around, Ted Cruz won his race by just over 2% of the vote – that was a difference of about 215,000 votes, friend. I remember how it felt watching the results roll in on November 6, 2018, and let me tell you, it was a nail-biter. I have no doubts that this year will be when we finally send Ted Cruz packing. But despite being closer than ever to defeating Ted, we've still got a lot more work to do and only a handful of days left to do it. I know seeing a number like $500,000 can feel overwhelming, but if thousands of hardworking folks like you chip in $5 here, $25 there, and the occasional $100, we will be able to collectively reach this critical goal. So please, will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's of $10 or whatever you can afford now so I can hit my daily fundraising goal and flip Texas blue? We've got zero time left to go, so let's get it done, friend! https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_colinallred?refcode=jtk5609-bu-text&amounts;=5,25,50,100,250 Thanks for being on my team, Colin Allred -------- This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Sent from Debbie's iPhone
email: info@e.debbieforflorida.com
subject: Just poured myself a cup — can we check in?
body: Good morning, friend — I just poured myself a cup of coffee and am eager towrite to you and get my day going! 🌞 I'll be honest: I need a lot of coffeethese days, and it's because I'm not sleeping much. Everything is OK, it'sjust that I'm a bundle of nerves and excitement in these final days of thecampaign, where we are so close to actually defeating Rick Scott andprotecting Democratic control of the Senate! I need you to know that we neverwould have gotten to a point where the polls are statistically tied, wherebrand new polling data has me leading by 18 points with independent voters,where Rick Scott is forced to spend tens of millions of dollars to competewith our grassroots movement, and where the major Democratic committees spendmillions of dollars of their own money to help us because they believe in us!Thank you, friend. A year ago at this time, the political pundits wrote offFlorida completely. We put Florida in play. We gave Rick Scott his notice. Weare on the cusp of pulling off the greatest political upset in modern history.But Rick Scott is outspending me nearly 3-to-1 on the airwaves — and he'salready spent over $38 million on ads to defeat me. Well, I don't have afraudulently earned fortune like him to tap into. I have you, friend. I havethis grassroots movement. And I can only fight back and win by closing in onmy final $4 million goal before Election Day. So please, will you make adonation of $5 or more to help me make history here in Florida? Whatever yougive will be put to work immediately to counter Rick Scott's attack ads,defeat him once and for all, and save our Democratic Senate majority!https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mw_dmp_2024_email_fr?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode;=jtk2478-fr-text Well, there's another cup of coffee gone ☕️. I hope you have a great day,friend. I'll check in with you again soon! Debbie -------- This email was sentto dpwillis67@gmail.com. body: New Poll shows my MAGA opponent taking the lead | | | |  ---  PLEASE, I’m begging you not to ignore this email. I need to show you thislatest poll out of Nevada:![2024 Nevada US Senate Race. Brown 47% Rosen46.2%](https://actionnetwork.org/user_files/user_files/000/115/176/original/NVDP_JR_1pt.png) ---  That’s right, team. **I’m ONE POINT DOWN against my Trump-endorsed opponent,Sam Brown.**After early voting data showed Republicans DOMINATING turnout, Mitch McConnellsaw a clear path to victory in our state. That’s why he blindsided ourcampaign with a surprise $6.2 MILLION ad blitz to ruthlessly attack me anddrown out my message.Republicans only need to flip one battleground Senate seat to retake themajority – and they have virtually unlimited resources on their side.**NOW,they are outspending my campaign – and their attacks are WORKING.**The GOP might outspend us – but I REFUSE to let them outwork us, folks. body: $10. That’s the donation I am asking you to split between my campaign and TimKaine’s campaign. I’ll explain more, but if that is all you need to hear, youcan make a donation at this link below:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-kamala[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-kamala] If you've saved yourpayment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go throughimmediately: DONATE $10[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-kamala?express_lane=true&amount;=10]DONATE $50[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-kamala?express_lane=true&amount;=50]DONATE $100[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-kamala?express_lane=true&amount;=100]DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-kamala] In four days,Virginia will decide who they want as their next U.S. Senator and their nextPresident. Ultimately, this election is about two different visions for ournation. One focused on the future . And one focused on the past . Tim Kaineand I believe in a future where every person has the opportunity not just toget by, but to get ahead. Where no child has to grow up in poverty. Whereevery worker has the freedom to join a union. Where every person hasaffordable health care, child care, and paid leave. Where every senior canretire with dignity. But Donald Trump and his extremist Republican allies wantto take our country backward. They intend to cut Social Security and Medicare,to give tax breaks to billionaires and big corporations and to make workingfamilies foot the bill, and end the Affordable Care Act. America has triedthese failed policies before. We are not going back. Generations of Americansbefore us led the fight for freedom. Now, the baton is in our hands. Toprotect the right to vote. To get assault weapons off of our streets. Torestore reproductive freedom, reversing Donald Trump's extreme abortion bans.Tim Kaine has spent his entire career fighting to improve the lives ofeveryday Virginians, and he knows there is more to be done. If you are readyto join us in the fight for freedom and opportunity for all, please split adonation of $10 to our campaigns. body: Your $7 donation could be the difference between electing state Democrats who fight to protect abortion rights or losing to one of our far-right Republican opponents. | | |  --- | ![](https://actionnetwork.org/user_files/user_files/000/097/354/original/2023_09_Email-Wrapper-Graphic_B_v2.png) |  ---|--- We have one question: Is defeating extreme Republicans across the country worth $7 to you? At the state legislative ballot level, races come down to a handful of votes, and resources are limited. A 5X-matched gift of $7 could give our in-state partners the necessary resources to fund get-out-the-vote efforts, hire digital staff, and invest in TV ads to spread our message across the airwaves. **Your 5X-matched $7 donation could be the difference between electing state Democrats who will fight to protect abortion rights or losing to one of our far-right Republican opponents who aim to attack all of our fundamental freedoms.** Before our match extension ends, we’re asking you directly. Is seeing Democrats win next week and defeating MAGA Republicans worth $7 to you? If it is, own a piece of this fight by chipping in now. We’re working to expand Democratic power, defend our majorities, and break up Republican supermajorities this fall – but it all starts with a donation from grassroots supporters like you. If you step up and decide $7 is worth investing before our deadline, you can feel good knowing that you helped Democrats gain power in states nationwide. We’re asking again: Will you donate a 5X-matched gift of $7 to help state Democrats defeat extreme Republicans in this election and beyond? | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.  --- | 5X-MATCH $7 --- | 5X-MATCH $25 --- | 5X-MATCH $50 --- | 5X-MATCH $100 --- | 5X-MATCH $250 --- | OTHER » ---  Thank you so much,Team DLCC  **5X-MATCH: ACTIVE »** **MAKE IT MONTHLY »**             | --- Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc.org. name: Hung Cao
email: info@itsourgreatamerica.com
subject: The end of the road
body: Fellow Patriot, I’m afraid we could be at the end of the road. I don’t mean tobe too negative, but Tim Kaine has a MASSIVE war chest, and I just don’t knowif we can overcome it. This is CAPT Hung Cao. I’m not a career politician likeTim Kaine. I’m a husband, a father, and a 25-year combat Naval Captain. I’malso running for Senate in what could be the biggest political upset inVirginia’s history I’m running against a 30+ year incumbent who has spent hisentire life serving Washington's special interests. Let’s just cut to thechase: I can’t do this alone. Can you pitch in to support my campaign? PITCHIN NOW I won’t lie, this is going to be an uphill battle, but I know thatwith you on our A-Team we can win this seat and take back the Senate. Our teamis gearing up for the upset of the century, and we want YOU to be a part ofit.Please, will you pitch in now to make sure we have the resources we need towin? SAVE OUR COUNTRY My wife and I are raising our children to grow up intohonest men and women, so you can trust that I’ll keep my promise to put ourCommonwealth and our country first in everything I do. In Liberty, CAPT HungCao USN (Ret) Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia Use of military rank, jobtitles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by theDepartment of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Unsubscribe.

name: Jon Favreau
email: info@email.bobcasey.com
subject: We need to do everything we can to make sure Bob wins
body: Jon Favreau here. If you’re way too online like me, you’ve probably seen a tonof headlines about a bunch of rich guys running for Senate in states wherethey don't even live. Connecticut mega-millionaire David McCormick is one ofthose rich guys, and he’s running against beloved Pennsylvania Senator, BobCasey. So look, this will be a very close race, and we need to do everythingwe can to make sure Bob wins — [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241101-2?refcode=em20241101-2&refcode2;=4745_552475_IPLfG2&akid;=4745%2E552475%2EIPLfG2]which is why I’m asking if you’ll contribute $5 towards his campaign today.David McCormick is a former Wall Street hedge-fund exec who wants you to thinkhe grew up on a Pennsylvania farm, which is only true if you think that livingin a mansion 10 minutes down the road from a farm where your family raisedArabian horses counts as “growing up on a farm.” But wait, Peter, there'smore: McCormick also thinks the most popular beer in Pennsylvania is called“YANG-ling,” which is like running for Senate in Massachusetts and saying youwant coffee from "DOON-kin’ Donuts." If it wasn’t obvious before, it’s crystalclear now: David McCormick is wrong for Pennsylvania. But this will be one ofthe toughest races of the year for Democrats. McCormick has millions uponmillions of dollars of his own to dump into this race, in addition to thebacking of Donald Trump and billionaire-funded super PACs. Pennsylvania is ascompetitive as it gets, and with the Senate majority and the White Housedepending on it, we can’t take anything for granted. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241101-2?refcode=em20241101-2&refcode2;=4745_552475_IPLfG2&akid;=4745%2E552475%2EIPLfG2]So please, will you chip in whatever you can to Bob’s campaign today? name: #6 Steve Garvey
email: info@freedomfirstalert.com
subject: The most important week
body: What matters most right now is that we do whatever we can to fund a campaignthat can win. That’s the most important thing. Winning this race.                                                                                                                  Fellow Patriot,I have an important message that I didn’t think I’d be sending you today. Injust a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign forU.S. Senate. November 5th isdays away, and I’d really appreciate the chance toexplain why this request — especially today — is so critically important.Here’s the truth: Right now, we have a week of media buys to pay for — themost important week of the entire campaign. And if we don’t raise what we neednow, we will be forced to give up the airwaves and let Adam Schiff and theDemocrat-machine backing him up run their attacks on me unopposed. Whatmatters most right now is that we do whatever we can to fund a campaign thatcan win. That’s the most important thing. Winning this race. Not just for thesake of winning, but because of what it would mean to substitute my presencewith Adam Schiff’s in the Senate. That’s a reality I don’t think any of uswant to consider, but it’s what will happen if we come up short. Now, time isrunning out. So, this is the part where I ask, one more time, and very humbly:Can you please use this link to make a donation to my campaign for U.S. Senatein California before Election Day? These emails are how we fund our campaign,and I really need you to chip in and help prevent us from falling behind.DONATE $35 DONATE $100 DONATE $500 DONATE $50 DONATE $250 DONATE $1000DONATE $35 DONATE $50 DONATE $100 DONATE $250 DONATE $500 DONATE $1000OTHER AMOUNT Thank you Fellow Patriot, and God bless, DONATE <> PAID FOR BYSTEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389Unsubscribe here

subject: No one has ever regretted getting off the sidelines
body: Peter, I’m an actress, director, singer, longtime activist, and, above all, acitizen of our great democracy. And as a citizen with a platform larger thanmost, I believe it is not only my right but also my duty to express myconcerns. So here goes Peter: I’m concerned by what I’m seeing in Pennsylvaniaand national Republicans’ ruthless efforts to unseat Bob Casey and flip thisbattleground red. If the GOP succeeds in flipping Pennsylvania red, they’llalmost certainly regain control of both the Senateand the White House,threatening everything from voting rights to women’s rights to the fightagainst climate change. That’s why outside interest groups have startedspending upwards of $150 million to defeat Bob. The stakes this November arehigher than ever before.So before I go on, can you please split a donationbetween Bob’s re-election campaign and Defeat Boebert PAC? DONATE NOW >> I’mcommitted to electing lawmakers like Bob Casey, who believes that everyonedeserves a fair shot at getting ahead and staying ahead. Bob’s opponent on theother hand is a Connecticut mega-millionaire who will do and say anything tohelp his own bottom line. With the most extreme Republican party of mylifetime teetering on the edge of regaining power, we need all hands on deck.If we’re going to protect our Senate majority and the White House, we must allstay informed and stay involved. So please, rush $25 or as much as you can toBob Casey and Defeat Boebert PAC right now to win in Pennsylvania.
